news.t: Raymond James Investment Management Launches Initial Suite of Active ETFs

holdings.infoBox: RJDI is an equity ETF with a total of 37 individual holdings. The top holdings are Broadcom stock at 7.86%, U.S. Bank Money Market Deposit Account at 5.85%, Analog Devices at 5.39%, Corning at 4.74%, and Walmart at 4.35%.

overview.description: The RJ Eagle GCM Dividend Select Income ETF (RJDI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF focusing on generating dividend yield higher than the S&P 500 and inflation, with volatility equal to or lower than the index. The fund focuses on US large-caps but has flexibility to stray into foreign companies and all market-caps. RJDI was launched on Oct 2, 2025 and is issued by Raymond James.
